MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF ELITE RECOVERY SOLUTIONS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $675, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions Against Michael James
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff ELITE RECOVERY SOLUTIONS' Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's interrogatories and request for production of documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $675, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Set For Trial On Feb-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions Against Michael James
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Malcolm Bowen Feied, Esq., appeared specially for Plaintiff and moving party: Elite Recovery; No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Elite Recovery Solutions' Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The service was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed on October 14, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
